card.header_style: flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2

button.default: bg-green-600 text-white hover:bg-green-700 rounded-none px-4 py-2 uppercase font-mono text-xs tracking-wider
button.outline: border border-green-600 text-green-500 hover:bg-green-950/50 rounded-none px-4 py-2 uppercase font-mono text-xs tracking-wider
button.ghost: hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 hover:text-white rounded-none px-4 py-2

input.style: flex h-9 w-full rounded-none border border-slate-800 bg-slate-950 px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-green-500 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badge.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-none border border-transparent bg-green-900/50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-green-400 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-400 focus:ring-offset-2
badge.destructive: inline-flex items-center rounded-none border border-transparent bg-red-900/50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-red-400 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-400 focus:ring-offset-2

icons.usage: Use strictly outlined icons with 1.5px stroke width

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INITIAL SETUP: Install React and Tailwind CSS. The current project is vanilla TS. You must convert it to React. Run: `npm install react react-dom react-router-dom tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion rechart`
2. CONFIGURATION: Create `tailwind.config.js` and `postcss.config.js`. Configure Tailwind to scan `./src/**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}`.
3. FILE STRUCTURE: Use `.jsx` (or `.js` with JSX) for components if constrained to JS files. Place components in `/app/src/components/`.
4. ROUTING: Set up `react-router-dom` in `App.jsx`. Create a main layout with a sidebar/header.
5. THEME: Apply the dark theme globally in `index.css`. Set `body { @apply bg-slate-950 text-slate-50; }`.
6. MAP INTEGRATION: Use `react-map-gl` or `deck.gl` for the Interactive Map. Center it on Pakistan coordinates [30.3753, 69.3451].
7. DATA FETCHING: Mock the data initially for News, Economy, and Infrastructure. Prepare FastAPI endpoints structure.
8. COMPONENT DEV: Build the 'Bento Grid' layout first, then fill it with 'Card' components.
9. ANIMATION: Use `framer-motion` for entrance animations (staggered fade-in) and `react-fast-marquee` for the News Ticker.
10. TESTING: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid dark colors with subtle borders.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give a 'Tactical' feel.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all data values, timestamps, and codes.
Green (#22C55E) is the primary color. Use it for 'Good/Active' states. Use Red (#EF4444) for 'Alert/Danger'.
All panels must have a 'Grid Border' style: `border border-slate-800 bg-slate-950/50 backdrop-blur-sm`.
Ensure the map is the 'Hero' element, taking up at least 50% of the screen real estate on desktop.
For the 'News Ticker', use a continuous scrolling text at the bottom or top of the screen.
